name: 2x4 16 o.c., R-13 FG batt, vinyl
note: Common pre-2008 MA construction. Below current code minimum without CI.

name: 2x4 16 o.c., R-15 high-density FG, vinyl
note: High-density FG batt fills 2x4 cavity to R-15. Still below MA code base for new construction.

name: 2x4 16 o.c., R-15 mineral wool, vinyl
note: Mineral wool batt; better fire and acoustic performance than FG.

name: 2x4 + R-5 XPS CI, vinyl
note: IECC R402.1.3 prescriptive option 'R-13 + R-5 ci' for CZ5. Meets MA base code.

name: 2x4 + R-10 polyiso CI, fiber-cement
note: Exceeds IECC R402.1.3; meets MA Stretch with margin. Polyiso aged R per CAN/ULC S770.

name: 2x6 16 o.c., R-19 FG batt, vinyl
note: Common 1990s–2000s MA wall. Compresses to ~R-18 at 5.5"; below current code base without CI.

name: 2x6 16 o.c., R-21 high-density FG, vinyl
note: Meets IECC Table R402.1.2 'R-20' cavity-only path for CZ5. Standard MA base-code wall.

name: 2x6 16 o.c., R-23 mineral wool, fiber-cement
note: Rockwool R-23 fits 2x6 cavity. Vapor-open; non-combustible.

name: 2x6 16 o.c., R-21 dense-pack cellulose, vinyl
note: Dense-pack cellulose at 3.5 pcf; minimal settling; vapor-open. Common WAP retrofit.

name: 2x6 + R-5 XPS CI, vinyl
note: Sheathing-side R-5 CI moves dewpoint outboard; controls condensation in CZ5/6. Meets MA Stretch.

name: 2x6 + R-10 polyiso CI, fiber-cement
note: High-performance assembly for MA Specialized; whole-wall R~28.

name: 2x6 24 o.c. advanced framing, R-23 + R-10 mineral wool CI, fiber-cement
description: 2x6 24 o.c. advanced framing, R-23 + R-10 mineral wool CI, fiber-cement
note: Advanced framing reduces FF; vapor-open assembly suitable for high-performance retrofit/new build.

name: 2x6 16 o.c., R-21 closed-cell SPF, vinyl
note: 3" ccSPF in 2x6 cavity. Acts as Class II vapor retarder; high air-seal performance. Specify thermal-barrier coverage.

name: 2x6 16 o.c., R-33 ccSPF flush-fill, fiber-cement
note: Full 5.25" ccSPF cavity fill; ~R-7/in aged. High R but cost and embodied-carbon premium.

name: Double 2x4 stud wall, ~10" cavity, R-39 dense-pack cellulose, vinyl
description: Double 2x4 stud wall, ~10" cavity, R-39 dense-pack cellulose, vinyl
note: Two parallel 2x4 walls separated by ~3" gap; ~10" total cavity dense-packed. Eliminates thermal bridging in framed path. Approximation: framing factor reduced to inner-stud only ~14%.

name: Larsen truss exterior, R-49 dense-pack cellulose, fiber-cement
description: Larsen truss exterior, R-49 dense-pack cellulose, fiber-cement
note: Larsen truss creates ~12" insulated zone outboard of structural 2x4. Used in deep-energy retrofits and Passive House projects in MA.

name: 2x6 16 o.c., R-21 FG, brick veneer
note: Brick veneer ~3 5/8" with 1" airgap; airgap not credited as siding R here. Mass-wall benefit not captured by parallel-path.

name: Pre-1950 uninsulated 2x4 wall, vinyl over old siding
description: Pre-1950 uninsulated 2x4 wall, vinyl over old siding
note: Common pre-1950 MA housing stock baseline. Audit reference only — never code-compliant. Cellulose dense-pack retrofit is the canonical WAP measure.
